blended.narrative: Grand Targhee is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,330 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.5" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 1.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 61".
